query:
SELECT estado, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM anuncios 
WHERE cliente = 'OPIOIDES' 
GROUP BY estado;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4MNpKPTYaa3AiSj.root --database NB4DzLv3DwSWij5HcQ7rQi --execute SELECT estado, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM anuncios 
WHERE cliente = 'OPIOIDES' 
GROUP BY estado;
